basic_details.job_title: IIT Bhilai Project Associate II Recruitment 2026 – Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) Bhilai, Chhattisgarh
basic_details.short_information: IIT Bhilai is recruiting 1 Project Associate-II post with B.Tech + M.Tech + GATE qualification, last date 05 July 2026.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions before applying.

how_to_apply: Interested candidates must apply by submitting the application form by email to [email protected] before 05/07/2026. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for an online interview.
important_instructions: No TA/DA will be provided for the interview. The position is temporary and co-terminus with the project. The decision of the selection committee will be final. Selected candidate will have to join duty immediately. The PI shall not be responsible for postal/courier delay or non-receipt of documents. If large number of candidates apply, shortlisting may be done based on qualifications and experience. Fellowship may be terminated with 30-day notice if performance is not satisfactory.

_labels.notification_pdf: IIT Bhilai Project Associate II Recruitment 2026 Official Notification

all_official_links.label: IIT Bhilai Project Associate II Recruitment 2026 Official Notification

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Bhilai Project Associate-II Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the IIT Bhilai Project Associate-II Recruitment 2026 is 05 July 2026. Eligible candidates must submit the prescribed application form through email before the deadline. Applications received after the closing date will not be considered for the recruitment process.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in IIT Bhilai Project Associate-II Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) Bhilai has announced 1 vacancy for the post of Project Associate-II under an ANRF-funded research project. Since there is only one position available, candidates meeting the eligibility criteria should apply as early as possible. The appointment will be purely on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for IIT Bhilai Project Associate-II Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess B.Tech and M.Tech in Metallurgical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Materials and Metallurgical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Production Engineering, or an equivalent discipline. Applicants must also have qualified GATE at least once in any engineering discipline. Candidates with experience in materials processing and characterization will be given preference.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for IIT Bhilai Project Associate-II Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly fellowship of Rs. 42,000 along with 20% House Rent Allowance (HRA) as per project guidelines. The salary will be paid under the ANRF-sponsored research project. Other benefits, if applicable, will be governed by the institute and funding agency rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for IIT Bhilai Project Associate-II Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official advertisement states that the age limit will be as per IIT Bhilai and sponsoring agency norms. Candidates should ensure they satisfy all eligibility conditions before applying. Any applicable age relaxation will be provided according to the institute's recruitment policies.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for IIT Bhilai Project Associate-II Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process consists of shortlisting of eligible applications followed by an online interview. Only shortlisted candidates will receive the interview invitation through email. The final selection will be based on academic qualifications, relevant experience, and interview performance.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for IIT Bhilai Project Associate-II Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Interested candidates must submit the completed application form through email to [email protected] on or before 05 July 2026. Applicants should ensure that all required documents are attached with the application. Incomplete or late applications may be rejected without further consideration.
